issues.detail: The skill is specific to macOS and Swift Package Manager, not cross-platform.

scenarios.name: Package and validate a SwiftPM app bundle for distribution
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the skill's Scripts/package_app.sh, version.env, build/<App>.app/Contents inspection with file and codesign/spctl checks; baseline reinvents an xcodebuild flow without the skill's two-step bootstrap and validation checkpoints.

scenarios.name: Diagnose and fix a hardened runtime notarization failure
scenarios.rationale: Treatment matches the skill's Common Notarization Failures table (add --options runtime, bump BUILD_NUMBER, xcrun notarytool history, stapler validate retry), while baseline gives a generic codesign answer missing version.env bump and xcrun notarytool history.
